_meta.description: Normalized union claims per (cell, arm) across 3 recommend-mode runs each. Substrate for oracle book-fidelity grading. DST-04: grader did NOT read .oracle/.

arms.invoke_skill: lz-refactor skill (smells + named Fowler/Kerievsky refactorings + GoF/FP patterns/idioms)
arms.code_review: mattpocock code-review skill (Standards axis = 12-Fowler-smell baseline; names smells + generic prose fixes; no named-refactoring/pattern vocabulary; Spec axis skips when no issue/PRD)

_meta.note: For code_review, refactorings_named is intentionally near-empty (design). Its real lift is captured in smells_named + notable_fixes_prose. Declined patterns are recorded in patterns_idioms_named with a (declined) marker.

smells_named: Long Function (run ~530 lines, sequence of ~9 boundary checks)
Duplicated Code (two near-identical fix() closures)
Duplicated Code (source-tag ternary repeated 5 sites)
Duplicated Code (five near-identical visitor callbacks)
Conditional Complexity (Kerievsky framing of run's branch accretion)
Comments explaining a block (Step 1/2/3 wildcard comments)
refactorings_named: Replace Method with Method Object / Replace Function with Command
Parameterize Function (shared fix skeleton + resolver callback)
Replace Temp with Query (awkward shared temps)
Introduce Parameter Object / Preserve Whole Object (fat arg clump)
patterns_idioms_named: Replace Conditional with Polymorphism (declined; rule objects unwarranted)
Replace Conditional Logic with Strategy (declined; ordered guards not one axis)
Chain of Responsibility (named as over-reach, declined)
notable_fixes_prose: Type escape hatches (node as any)/(global as any) noted as non-Fowler; localize with typed helper
Preserve fixer output strings + report messageId/data byte-identical through extraction

Rename run -> checkImport / validateImport
Variable shadowing at line 768: rename inner binding, drop unused target
Style (judgement): missing blank lines around control flow / returns
